text:
First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
SCHIOT_MEDICARE_EVER Schizophrenia and Other Psychotic Disorders - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
TOBA_COMBINED Tobacco Use Disorders - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
TOBA_MEDICAID Tobacco Use Disorders - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met
